reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte del personal mecanico de ACA, nos atendieron de urgencia ya que no encendia nuestro auto y estabamos de viaje. Diagnosticaron el problema con rapidez y lo solucionaron en el momento. Fueron muy amables y honestos!
Nos solucionaron el viaje!!! 10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the ACA mechanics. They provided emergency assistance because our car wouldn't start while we were traveling. They diagnosed the problem quickly and fixed it immediately. They were very friendly and honest!
They made our trip a success! 10 points
